raw.subject: Your Oshkosh page caught my eye; Farmers Markets and Egg Rolls
raw.body:
Hi,

I love the energy of your Facebook page, especially your posts about the Oshkosh Farmers Market. It's clear you're a big part of the community.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might mean you're losing bookings and calls from potential customers who want to dine in or order online.

I sketched out a simple page idea from your Facebook photos and posts. It includes a menu hero, hours block, photo gallery, and map & directions. Take a look: 

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/zoua-s-fresh-egg-rolls-oshkosh

If you'd like to discuss a straightforward project to build out your online presence, I offer a flat fee for local businesses. Please reply or let's have a quick call to discuss further.
